title: Live updates: Remnants of Typhoon Halong are bringing flooding and hurricane-force winds to Western Alaska
summary: Emergency managers said rescues have been requested, but details were scarce early Sunday. Some residents are reportedly missing or trapped in houses as a major storm brings high water and winds to Western Alaska. The remnants of Typhoon Halong have already caused damaging flooding in Yukon-Kuskokwi...

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Tanacross [AK25056561]
summary: On October 11th, 2025, Tok AST contacted Paul Brinkman Jr. in Tanacross. Brinkman was found to have an active warrant for his arrest. He was arrested and remanded to FCC.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST DV Assault: Allakaket [AK25101357]
summary: On October 4, 2025, at approximately 2347 hours, AST received a report of a disturbance in Allakaket. Investigation was completed on October 12, 2025 and resulted in 34-year-old Derek Simon being arrested for assault in the fourth degree and assault in the presence of a child.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Fairbanks couple brings Bible Story Hour into library that pushes drag queen events for kids
summary: A Fairbanks couple has successfully established a “Bible Story Hour” in a library that has stirred controversy for hosting monthly drag queen story hours for children. The idea to launch a Bible Story Hour predated the arrival of children-focused drag events in the Noel Wien Library, but the latter...

title: A month after Kirk’s murder, Turning Point proliferates across Alaska schools
summary: Conservative youth across Alaska are bolder and more inspired than ever to launch or join Turning Point USA (TPUSA) chapters at their college campus or local high school. Ever since TPUSA founder Charlie Kirk was fatally shot during a Sept. 10 campus speaking event in Utah, Turning Point chapters ha...
